commit.message:
feat: ingest full git commit history from GitHub modal

Problems fixed:
1. GitHub modal was POSTing to /v1/research/github (404) — corrected
   to /v1/github/repos with proper {url, bucket} body shape.
2. Tarball-only ingestion captures a code snapshot but no history —
   searching for 'why was X changed' or 'what did we fix in March' found
   nothing because commit messages were never indexed.

Changes:
- github-ingest-service.ts: add ingestGitHistory() — pages through
  GitHub Commits API (100/page), formats each commit as:
    ## {sha} — {date}
    Author: {name}
    {message}
    Files:
      M engine/src/search.ts (+22 -4)
  Ingests the full log as compound github:{owner}/{repo}/commit-history.md
  with buckets [user-bucket, 'git-history'] so it can be filtered.

- git.ts: accept include_history boolean in POST /v1/github/repos.
  Runs syncRepo() first, then ingestGitHistory() in background.

- index.html: fix route URL; add 'Include full commit history' checkbox
  (on by default) with descriptive subtext.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
perf(auth): cache getUser() to eliminate redundant auth network calls

Replace direct supabase.auth.getUser() calls (network round-trip) with
authService.getToken() which uses a 5-minute cache via getCurrentUser().

Before: 8-9 getUser() network calls per page load (one per API request)
After: 1 getUser() call per 5 minutes (cached), getSession() for token

Files changed:
- auth-service.ts: getToken() uses cached getCurrentUser() instead of getUser()
- api.ts (user-dashboard): uses authService.getToken() instead of direct calls
- query-client.ts: uses authService.getToken() instead of direct calls

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: scaffold ConsultingAgent and ecosystem demo

- orchestrator/agents/consulting_agent.py: e-commerce advisor
  - Benchmark-based rules for 4 key metrics (conversion, abandonment, LTV:CAC, MAPE)
  - LLM path via Claude; graceful fallback to benchmarks
  - EcommerceMetrics, ConsultingReport, ConsultingRecommendation dataclasses
- orchestrator/agents/__init__.py: exports ConsultingAgent
- tests/test_consulting_agent.py: 13 tests covering all paths
- demo.py: end-to-end demo of all 3 agents with sample data

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
MYTUBE-146 Test: Load public video watch page — Video.js player initializes and HLS stream plays (#271)

* MYTUBE-146 test: automate Test: Load public video watch page — Video.js player initializes and HLS stream plays

* Add DB presetup fixture for stable ready video in MYTUBE-146 tests

Creates testuser_mytube146 and a ready video with hls_manifest_path before
Playwright tests run. Injects MYTUBE_146_VIDEO_ID so ready_video fixture
picks it up directly. Teardown cleans up only that user's data via
_cleanup_users, leaving other DB rows intact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* MYTUBE-146 test: automate Test: Load public video watch page — Video.js player initializes and HLS stream plays

* test(MYTUBE-146): fix HLS mock route and control bar visibility

- Change _HLS_TEMPLATE to HTTPS GCS URL so Playwright can intercept
  it (Mixed Content blocks HTTP subresources from HTTPS pages before
  CDP Fetch.requestPaused fires, making route() a no-op for gs:// URLs)
- Add page.route() lambda matching .m3u8 to serve a minimal valid HLS
  playlist, preventing vjs-error / vjs-controls-disabled state
- Click play in fixture to trigger vjs-has-started; app CSS requires
  this class before the control bar becomes visible (display:flex)
- Update click_play() to fall back to .vjs-play-control when the big
  play button is hidden (e.g. in vjs-ended state after empty playlist)
- Fix _VIDEO_JS_ELEMENT selector to include video.vjs-tech (Video.js v8
  restructures the DOM so the <video> receives vjs-tech not video-js)
- Add is_playing_or_ended() to accept vjs-ended for zero-duration stream

All 8 tests now pass.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ac): reset ac_project_state to idle on gated/failed cycle + inject INCEPTION.md into agent context

  update ac_project_state.status='idle' so watchdog doesn't retry infinitely
- engine.py: in _build_node_context, auto-inject INCEPTION.md content into

  needing to call code_read first

docs: add comprehensive team productivity analysis documentation

- Dedicated 'Team Productivity Analysis' section with:

  - Complete metrics table (7 metrics with descriptions and use cases)

commit.message:
Remove legacy compatibility layers: field indirection, package re-exports, v4 migration, GPS three-state (#595)

* Initial plan

* Remove legacy compatibility layers: v4 migration, GPS three-state, unused lang param, backward-compat tests

- history_db.py: Remove v4→v5 migration, _iter_legacy_samples, _has_legacy_samples
- gps_speed.py: Simplify manual_source_selected from bool|None to bool (default True)
- routes/history.py: Remove unused lang parameter from insights endpoint
- runlog.py, findings/__init__.py, live_diagnostics/__init__.py: Update docstrings
- test_history_db.py: Replace migration test with rejection test
- test_findings_subpackage.py: Remove backward-compat import test
- test_live_diagnostics_components.py: Remove TestBackwardCompatReExports
- test_api_history_endpoints.py: Remove/update lang-dependent tests
- test_analysis_persistence.py: Remove lang param from insights call
- GPS test files: Update manual_source_selected None→True
- CHANGELOG.md: Document breaking changes

Co-authored-by: Skamba <8420201+Skamba@users.noreply.github.com>

* Remove REPORT_FIELDS/METRIC_FIELDS identity-mapping indirection

Replace all REPORT_FIELDS["x"] and METRIC_FIELDS["x"] lookups with
direct string literals since these mappings were identity (key == value)
and served no purpose.

Files changed:
- domain_models.py: remove import, inline all field name strings
- sample_builder.py: remove import, inline field name strings
- contract_reference_doc.py: remove import, use hardcoded field lists
- test_shared_contracts_smoke.py: remove import, use string literals
- heuristics_audit.py: check domain_models.py for literal field names
  instead of checking a non-existent shared_contracts.py for METRIC_FIELDS

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* refactor: remove re-export shims from findings/__init__.py and live_diagnostics/__init__.py

Replace package-level re-exports with direct submodule imports across all
callers (production code and tests). Both __init__.py files now contain
only their docstrings.

Updated 23 files: 4 production modules and 17 test files to import
directly from the specific submodules (builder, intensity, order_findings,
persistent_findings, speed_profile, reference_checks, engine, _types,
severity_matrix).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Remove REPORT_FIELDS/METRIC_FIELDS indirection, findings and live_diagnostics re-exports

- domain_models.py, sample_builder.py: Replace REPORT_FIELDS/METRIC_FIELDS
  identity-mapping lookups with direct string literals
- contract_reference_doc.py: Inline canonical field name lists
- findings/__init__.py: Remove all re-exports; callers now import from submodules
- live_diagnostics/__init__.py: Remove all re-exports; callers now import from submodules
- Updated 23+ callers (4 production + 19 test files) to import directly
- CHANGELOG.md: Document breaking changes

Co-authored-by: Skamba <8420201+Skamba@users.noreply.github.com>

## 変更内容

### セキュリティ強化
- WebSocket: トークンをURLクエリパラメータから最初のメッセージ認証に変更
  - backend: _ws_authenticate()ヘルパー追加、3エンドポイント更新
  - frontend: dashboard.html, realtime-alerts.html, alert-center.js, prod/dashboard.html更新
  - トークンがnginxログ・ブラウザ履歴に残らなくなる
- X-Forwarded-For: TRUSTED_PROXY_IPS環境変数で信頼プロキシIPを制御
  - _get_client_ip()ヘルパーでIPスプーフィング対策

### 承認フロー改善
- approval_service: 13の新オペレーションタイプハンドラー追加
  - container_stop/restart/prune, nfs_mount/umount
  - backup_run/restore, ansible_playbook_run

### sudo_wrapper拡張

commit.message:
Fix baseline data quality: populate MBI scores and documentation coverage

Problem:
Baselines stored zeroed MBI scores (0.00) and documentation coverage (0.00%)
despite full analysis showing 76% doc coverage. This undermined the reliability
of trend analysis and historical metrics.

Root Cause:
The baseline creation (cmd/baseline.go) used pkg/generator.AnalyzeDirectory()
which only performs basic file analysis without running finalization steps that
populate MBI scores (finalizeScoringMetrics) and documentation coverage
(finalizeDocumentationMetrics).

Solution:
Modified analyzeCodebase() to use the full analysis workflow
(runAnalysisWorkflow) instead of the simplified public API. This ensures all
metrics are properly populated during baseline creation.

Changes:
- cmd/baseline.go: Use runAnalysisWorkflow() for complete metric population
- cmd/baseline_test.go: Add regression test TestAnalyzeCodebase_PopulatesAllMetrics
- FUNCTIONAL_AUDIT.md: Mark finding as resolved

Verification:
- Before: MBI=0.00, DocCov=0.00%
- After: MBI=13.03, DocCov=47.76%
- Tests: All pass (go test -race ./...)
- Diff: Zero regressions, Quality=100.0/100

Resolves FUNCTIONAL_AUDIT.md 'Trend analysis baseline data quality issues'

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add secret scanning workflow with issue alerting

Adds a GitHub Actions workflow that runs TruffleHog on every push and PR
to detect committed secrets. When verified secrets are found, it opens a
GitHub Issue with the secret-leak label and fails the workflow run.

The plan-3-v2-architect command now generates a quick-reference Phase

title, primary domain, objective, and dependencies — so users can scan
all phases at a glance without scrolling through the full document.

fix(ac-pilots): adversarial bypass removed — FAIL on score≥7, 3 retries, synthesis fix, all_approved gates

- engine.py: MAX_ADVERSARIAL_RETRIES 1→2 (3 total attempts)
- engine.py: score≥7 after max retries → NodeStatus.FAILED (no more 'forward progress > perfection' bypass)
- engine.py: score≤6 only → pass with warning (minor issues acceptable)
- executor.py: synthesis expansion — output <80 chars + tools called → force 200-word report
- ac-improvement-cycle.yaml: inception gate always→all_approved
- ac-improvement-cycle.yaml: tdd-sprint gate no_veto→all_approved

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- Enhanced documentation in both example scripts to clarify usage and prerequisites.
- Deleted `pyproject.toml` as it was no longer needed.

- Added comprehensive unit tests for the AzureBlobBackend to ensure functionality and error handling.

- Fix escape order: backslash before backtick in computer.rs and agent_computer.rs
- Clamp fps to minimum 1 to prevent division-by-zero panic (agent.rs, recording.rs)

commit.message:
build-rootfs: add HOSTNAME variable support

Allows setting the board hostname at image build time via the HOSTNAME
environment variable. Defaults to 'cubieboard4' if not set.

Usage:
  HOSTNAME=myboard WIFI_SSID=MyNet WIFI_PASSWORD=secret sudo scripts/build-rootfs.sh

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
docs: update E-01 audit status to Fixed

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

refactor(api): extract UserProfileService — deduplicate profile queries (E-01)

Create UserProfileService with 6 methods replacing duplicated
SecureServiceRoleWrapper + indb_auth_user_profiles query boilerplate
across 8 route files:

- getFullProfile() — profile/route.ts, billing/overview
- getTrialStatus() — trial-status/route.ts
- getSubscriptionDates() — trial-eligibility, my-subscription
- getBillingInfo() — billing/packages
- getPaddleCustomerId() — customer-portal
- getSubscriptionCheck() — rank-tracking/domains

Net: +231 lines (service) / -245 lines (routes) = 14 lines saved,
but the real win is single-source query logic + consistent audit trail.

commit.message:
fix: comprehensive responsive fixes across all components

- App: min-h-screen instead of h-screen for mobile viewports
- Header: dropdown scales to viewport width on small screens
- Sidebar: close on backdrop tap, close button on mobile, onClose prop
- SummaryView: hide toggle on mobile when sidebar open (sidebar has close btn)
- SummaryForm: responsive hero text (3xl→5xl→7xl), 2-col grid at sm breakpoint
- Summary/TypingSummary: responsive padding, flex-wrap for action buttons
- SummarizeAgainInput: stacks vertically on mobile, full-width bottom bar
- PickedFile: smaller icon on mobile (w-12→w-16), responsive text size
- InputComponent: responsive textarea padding

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: fuzzytextsummarizer
repository.description: Implementation of a novel text summarization system that combines fuzzy logic and advanced natural language processing (NLP) techniques to generate accurate and contextually relevant summaries. The system aims to address the challenges of ambiguity and vagueness inherent in human language by leveraging the power of fuzzy logic.
